steps.t: The body is located on the bank of the river Ringló, in the town of Ethring. Return to the body.
The body is located on the bank of the river Ringló, in the town of Ethring. You should examine the body again.
Laerind is located in Ethring village. You should speak with Laerind.
Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. You should speak with Jajax.
Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. Have a drink with Jajax.
Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. You should speak with Jajax.
